title: vitis bourquiniana
intro: Vitis bourquiniana, also known as the Mexican grapevine, is a species of grapevine native to Mexico and Central America. It is a climbing plant with edible fruits and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis bourquiniana include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
